title: Luffy and Wyper Clash on Upper Yard
main_description: The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
key_events: Luffy and Wyper Clash on Upper Yard
The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
